query:
INSERT INTO course_enrollments (userId, courseId, accessCodeId, enrolledAt)
SELECT u.id, c.id, ac.id, NOW()
FROM users u
CROSS JOIN courses c
CROSS JOIN access_codes ac
WHERE u.email = 'student@test.com' 
AND c.title LIKE '%Old Testament%'
AND ac.code = 'WELCOME2025'
LIMIT 1
